name: Virry Happy: mindfulness in nature VR

reviews.review_description:
This is really relaxing and beautiful. Living in a small flat in the city I love VR that can transport you into nature and the landscapes in this are really stunning. 

The experiences take a bit of time to upload, but its totally worth the wait as you can use it to relax and meditate whenever you want and there are lots of experiences to choose from. I like the rivers and waterfalls for meditation and the elephants just to chill and watch.
